about_text.value: Core lexicon: petition, proof, gate, vault, field, mandate, drift. Signal sits in state transitions and admissibility.

text_script.value: Wake. Mandate wants gate control. Proof wants exposure. Vault wants admissible trace.
open dim gate
Dim gate. Vault coherence up.
Silent mandate admitted. Symmetry down.
open bright gate
Bright gate. Proof pressure up.
Visible skew turns drift into evidence.
Seal wants convergence before any petition proceeds.
seal route

Act I: route hardens; seam logged.
split route

Act I: variance kept; basin count preserved.

seal basin
The chamber emits a final packet into the ending field.
The chamber biases the ending field without fully sealing it.
reopen basin
The chamber shears the ending field toward a rival basin.
The chamber keeps multiple endings alive for one more recompute.
